title: jasminum narcissiodorum
intro: Jasminum narcissiodorum, also known as the star jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum narcissiodorum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. The herbal preparations of Jasminum narcissiodorum include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
